creator: nikola.lecic@anthesphoria.net
text:
* Mark this port with MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE. The build fails with FORCE_MAKE_JOBS=yes. The build log:
http://anthesphoria.net/FreeBSD/ports/logs/m17n-im-config-0.9.0.log

* Update pkg-descr to reflect the new m17n database and thus provide accurate search results with a language name as a key.
